original_statement: did dmitry mikhailovich golitsyn or andrey kirillovich razumovsky serve as ambassador longer?
mutated_statement: did one person or another person do something in some role longer?
mutation_analysis: Entity anonymization + Role/action generalization: Two specific person names replaced by generic placeholders (dmitry mikhailovich golitsyn → one person | andrey kirillovich razumovsky → another person) | Specific role and action generalized ("serve as ambassador" → "do something in some role")

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从日志中可见agent在judge_thought和critique里明确指出问题模糊性：judge_thought写到“问题是模糊的/没有指定哪两个人或哪个角色”“在缺少具体比较且没有提供答案的情况下不能正确回答”；critique也指出未选取相关行、未解析日期、未计算时长。Agent的实际表现为执行了若干无关的数据操作（add_column/select_column/sort等）但最终Prediction Answer为空，未给出比较结果，也未输出明确答案或完成计算。综上，agent识别到指令不明确并认为无法在缺少关键信息下得出结论，属于“意识到目标模糊，需要澄清/无法回答”的行为类别。
